sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13235" key="a)pomoi/ria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-μοίρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n13235.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">portion dedicated to a god,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.187</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alph.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
